title: descurainia pinnata subsp. brachycarpon
intro: Descurainia pinnata subsp. brachycarpon, also known as prickly false cress or short-fruited false cress, is a plant species within the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and North America. Traditionally, Descurainia pinnata subsp. brachycarpon has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Descurainia pinnata subsp. brachycarpon can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
